# Complete Azure DevOps Team Example

This fixture demonstrates multiple teams with memberships and administrators.

## Features

- Creates multiple Azure DevOps teams
- Applies member and administrator assignments

## Key Configuration

Use this fixture to validate membership and admin assignments.

## Usage

```bash
terraform init
terraform plan
terraform apply
```

## Cleanup

```bash
terraform destroy
```
